insight:
Yesterday was a solid training day! Your 71-minute virtual ride at 129 bpm average shows you're building good aerobic base fitness, and burning 2951 calories puts you well above your daily target - great for your weight loss goals. Your resting HR of 45 bpm demonstrates excellent cardiovascular fitness, and that low stress level of 29 shows you're handling training well mentally.

Your HRV at 119ms is notably above your baseline of 90-111ms, which is fantastic news. This elevated HRV, combined with your low resting HR and stress levels, signals your body has recovered well from recent training. You're primed for a quality session today - stick to your planned workout without modification.

However, that 6-hour sleep is concerning, especially with just 17 days until Chester. Poor sleep can quickly derail recovery despite today's good markers. Prioritize getting 7-8 hours tonight - your body needs that extra recovery time to maximize these final weeks of preparation.
